admission_routes.admission_process: VITEEE rank followed by centralized online counselling; campus, programme and fee-category choices are submitted and allotment depends on rank and availability.
admission_routes.required_board_subjects: Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics for most B.Tech programmes; PCB route only for officially listed eligible programmes
admission_routes.pwd_provisions: Disability support exists; admission provisions require current official confirmation
admission_routes.branch_change_rules: No sliding/upgradation or campus/programme/category change after allotment is stated in the VITEEE instructions.

admission_routes.entrance_exam: Scheme-specific selection for eligible rural government-school district toppers
admission_routes.note: Exact programme, district and year-specific eligibility must be verified.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: DSA; object-oriented programming; systems fundamentals; web/backend or mobile development
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Data structures, algorithms, operating systems, databases, networks
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Git, Linux, one production language, testing, cloud basics
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Build and deploy 2–3 substantial products; contribute to open source
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: programming foundations. Year 2: DSA and one stack. Year 3: internships, systems depth and interview practice. Year 4: targeted revision and portfolio evidence.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: Python; statistics; SQL; data cleaning; modelling; experimentation
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Probability, statistics, linear algebra, machine learning
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Python, pandas, scikit-learn, SQL, visualization tools
company_skill_guidance.communication_requirements: Explain assumptions, uncertainty and business impact
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: End-to-end analytics project with reproducible notebook and deployed model
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: Python and math. Year 2: SQL/statistics. Year 3: ML projects and internships. Year 4: case studies and model evaluation.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: Structured problem solving; market sizing; research; spreadsheet modelling
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Industry-analysis deck and a measurable campus consulting project
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: communication and campus exposure. Year 2: cases and Excel. Year 3: live projects/internships. Year 4: interview drills and sector depth.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: User research; metrics; prioritization; experimentation; technical literacy
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Analytics, prototyping, roadmapping and collaboration tools
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Ship a product with user interviews, metrics and iteration evidence
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: build and observe users. Year 2: analytics/design basics. Year 3: product internships. Year 4: product cases and portfolio.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: Digital/analog design; HDL; microcontrollers; verification; signal basics
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Digital electronics, analog circuits, computer architecture, signals
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Verilog/SystemVerilog, FPGA tools, SPICE, C/C++, lab instruments
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: FPGA/ASIC block, embedded device or verification project
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: circuits/programming. Year 2: digital/analog labs. Year 3: HDL/embedded specialization and internship. Year 4: verification/design interviews.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: Power systems; machines; control; protection; simulation
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Electrical machines, power electronics, control systems
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: MATLAB/Simulink, ETAP/PSCAD where available, CAD and instrumentation
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: math/circuits. Year 2: machines/control. Year 3: simulation and industrial internship. Year 4: domain interviews and standards.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: CAD; mechanics; thermal/fluid fundamentals; manufacturing; quality
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, design, manufacturing processes
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: CAD/CAE, MATLAB/Python, GD&T, basic CNC/process tools
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Designed-and-built mechanism, thermal study or process-improvement project
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: workshop and CAD. Year 2: core mechanics. Year 3: CAE/manufacturing internship. Year 4: design portfolio and domain preparation.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Structures, soil mechanics, transportation, construction management
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: CAD/BIM, structural or geotechnical software, spreadsheets
company_skill_guidance.communication_requirements: Site communication, reporting and safety awareness
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Structural model, transport analysis or sustainable-infrastructure study
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: drafting and mechanics. Year 2: core civil subjects. Year 3: software/site internship. Year 4: portfolio, codes and project cases.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: Mass/energy balances; transport; process control; safety; quality
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Thermodynamics, reaction engineering, transport phenomena, process design
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Process simulators, MATLAB/Python, laboratory and quality tools
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Process-design, optimization, formulation or sustainability project
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: chemistry/math. Year 2: balances/thermo. Year 3: simulation/lab internship. Year 4: process design and industry-specific preparation.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Excel, Python/C++, SQL, financial data tools
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Back-tested strategy, risk model or valuation project with limitations
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: math/programming. Year 2: finance/statistics. Year 3: competitions/internships. Year 4: role-specific probability, coding and market preparation.

company_skill_guidance.label: General career guidance; not a VIT Vellore- or recruiter-specific verified requirement
company_skill_guidance.essential_technical_skills: Optimization; forecasting; process design; inventory; analytics
company_skill_guidance.common_academic_subjects: Operations research, statistics, economics, manufacturing systems
company_skill_guidance.tools_and_technologies: Spreadsheets, SQL/Python, optimization and dashboard tools
company_skill_guidance.suggested_projects: Demand forecast, routing, inventory or process-improvement project
company_skill_guidance.preparation_roadmap: Year 1: analytics basics. Year 2: OR/statistics. Year 3: live operations project. Year 4: case interviews and sector depth.

hostels_and_facilities.label: Official availability, not an independent quality rating
hostels_and_facilities.residential_policy: All UG and PG programmes are residential; students residing within 65 km may register as day scholars under the 2026-27 information sheet.
hostels_and_facilities.hostel_count_warning: Current public renderings conflict; verify block counts before import.
room_types: regular, deluxe and apartment options depending on block/gender
hostels_and_facilities.laundry: Mechanized laundry; first-year fee schedules include up to 44 washes
hostels_and_facilities.medical_centre: 20 inpatient beds, round-the-clock pharmacy and first aid, laboratory, physiotherapy and emergency equipment
hostels_and_facilities.ambulance: Three ambulances and 24-hour ambulance service are institution-published
hostels_and_facilities.transport: Local buses and shared autos; late-night/early-hour chaperone support to nearby transport points is institution-published
hostels_and_facilities.accessibility_facilities: Disability support is institution-published; detailed infrastructure audit not verified
hostels_and_facilities.hostel_rules: Affidavit and code-of-conduct requirements apply; detailed movement rules may change

hostel_2026_first_year_cost_ranges.includes: room, mess, INR 15,000 non-refundable admission fee and INR 15,000 refundable caution deposit

location.official_address: Vellore Institute of Technology, Katpadi–Thiruvalam Road, Vellore, Tamil Nadu 632014, India
location.public_transport: Frequent rail and bus links; local government buses, shared autos and app-based transport
location.technology_ecosystem: Ranipet/SIPCOT industrial corridor and Vellore healthcare ecosystem; Chennai and Bengaluru technology markets require intercity travel
location.nearby_student_housing: PG and rental options exist around Katpadi, but most first-year B.Tech students use campus residence
location.cost_of_living_band: Moderate outside campus; hostel choice materially changes annual cost
common_travel_routes: Katpadi Junction to campus by auto/bus
Chennai Central to Katpadi by train
Chennai airport to rail/bus interchange, then Vellore
location.data_origin: Official transport pages plus map-derived local estimates

senior_junior_culture.summary: Official welfare systems include mentoring, programme representatives, a student council and anti-ragging mechanisms. Public student discussions indicate useful senior guidance for onboarding, clubs and academics, but the evidence is not strong enough for a campus-wide hierarchy judgement.
positive_themes: peer and senior guidance is available
negative_themes: freshers can find onboarding and hostel allocation confusing

academic_culture.summary: FFCS provides timetable and elective choice, while attendance and assessment workload are recurring student concerns. A commonly discussed 75% threshold and high-CGPA exemptions require confirmation from current academic regulations rather than social posts.
negative_themes: faculty and course experience varies at scale
academic_culture.agreement: Students agree on workload but differ on attendance exemptions

hostel_reality.summary: Official sources verify a very large residential system with AC/non-AC sharing options, Wi-Fi, laundry, security and multiple mess choices. Student reports consistently describe major differences between blocks, room sizes, bathrooms, walking distance and food experience.
positive_themes: on-campus laundry, pharmacy and food services
hostel_reality.agreement: Strong agreement that experience is block/provider dependent

club_and_campus_life.summary: VIT officially publishes a broad club, chapter, festival and student-governance ecosystem. Student sources consistently describe many events and opportunities, while current activity, selection difficulty and value vary by organisation.
negative_themes: many pages lack dated recent activity

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: The institution has a large centralized placement system, technical clubs and a broad employer network. This scale creates both opportunity and intense competition. Students repeatedly recommend independent coding, projects, hackathons and external internship efforts.
negative_themes: branch and CGPA filters are not publicly transparent

locality_and_student_life.summary: Katpadi Junction provides strong rail connectivity, while Chennai airport requires a long transfer. Vellore offers healthcare, food and daily services but is not a major technology-city campus; metro-based internships usually require travel or remote arrangements.
negative_themes: urban nightlife and exposure are more limited than metro campuses

overall_satisfaction.summary: Student evidence commonly frames VIT Vellore as opportunity-rich but crowded and expensive. Students who proactively use clubs, projects and placement preparation report better value; those expecting a small cohort, low fees or highly personalized administration may be less satisfied.
overall_satisfaction.agreement: Broadly consistent on opportunities and scale-related drawbacks

parent_mode_summary.total_cost: Latest public B.Tech tuition is labelled 2025-26: INR 1.73 lakh Group A, INR 2.07 lakh L&T Civil, and INR 1.95 lakh Group B per year. 2026-27 first-year hostel totals range from about INR 1.51 lakh to INR 2.79 lakh depending on gender and option.
parent_mode_summary.scholarship_possibilities: GVSDP rank-based waivers, need-based assistance, merit, sports, STARS and government schemes may apply; every award requires current verification.
parent_mode_summary.placement_stability: NIRF institution-level UG four-year median fell from 9.0 LPA in 2022-23 to 6.0 LPA in 2024-25, while placed/graduating ratio calculated from NIRF data declined from 69.80% to 58.95%. Campus-isolated scope is uncertain.
parent_mode_summary.travel: Katpadi Junction is close, but Chennai airport is about 135 km away.
parent_mode_summary.hostel: Large residential system with many options and substantial 2026-27 cost variation; public block-count information conflicts.
parent_mode_summary.medical_access: On-campus health centre, pharmacy and ambulances plus access to CMC Vellore.
parent_mode_summary.academic_discipline: Attendance is a meaningful operational constraint in student reports.
parent_mode_summary.source_confidence: Admissions, programmes, scholarships and hostel fees are official. Cutoffs and Vellore-only placement outcomes are not publicly available.

student_mode_summary.branch_fit: VIT Vellore offers 19 B.Tech options, but branch choice should account for tuition group, curriculum and recruiter eligibility rather than only the CSE label.
student_mode_summary.coding_and_core_culture: Large technical-club and employer ecosystem; self-driven projects, coding and hackathons are important because competition is intense.
student_mode_summary.clubs_and_life: Strong breadth of clubs and events, though current activity varies and some directory pages are stale.
student_mode_summary.academic_flexibility: Course choice is broad, but attendance and administrative rules can reduce practical flexibility.
student_mode_summary.hostel_experience: Many room/mess choices and on-campus services; quality, distance and cost vary significantly by block.
student_mode_summary.internships: Students repeatedly recommend hackathons, external applications and project work in addition to the campus pipeline.
student_mode_summary.peer_environment: Large and diverse, with strong opportunity but also crowding and competition.
student_mode_summary.city_exposure: Good rail access; Vellore is not a metro technology hub.
student_mode_summary.placement_roadmap: Maintain CGPA, build role-specific projects, use technical clubs and verify branch/company filters early.
major_risks: paying a high category fee without using opportunities
assuming third-party cutoff tables are official

decision_risks.risk: 2026-27 B.Tech academic tuition is unresolved publicly
decision_risks.evidence: UG fee page title is 2026-27 but B.Tech subsection remains labelled 2025-26

decision_risks.risk: Public Category 1–5 fee mapping is unavailable
decision_risks.evidence: Counselling uses fee categories while the public B.Tech page shows Group A/B

decision_risks.risk: Placement results are not safely isolated to Vellore Campus
decision_risks.evidence: NIRF institution record and centralized all-campus CDC disclosures

decision_risks.risk: Very large cohort creates strong competition
decision_risks.evidence: NIRF student/intake scale and repeated student reports

decision_risks.risk: Premium hostel options materially increase cost
decision_risks.evidence: Official 2026-27 men and women hostel schedules

decision_risks.risk: Attendance rules may conflict with students seeking maximum flexibility
decision_risks.evidence: Repeated but conflicting student reports; current regulation needs verification

decision_risks.risk: Hostel and mess experience varies by block/provider
decision_risks.evidence: Official multiple-option system and repeated student accounts

decision_risks.risk: Core-branch student assuming equal software-role access
decision_risks.evidence: Centralized recruiter disclosures do not publish branch eligibility

data_gaps: No public official branch-wise VITEEE closing-rank table for 2023–2026.
No public 2026 Category 1–5 B.Tech fee table was verified.
The public B.Tech tuition subsection remains labelled 2025-26.
The latest fully extracted branch-wise AICTE sanctioned intake is 2024-25, not 2026-27.
Current programme-wise NBA accreditation validity was not verified.
Vellore-campus-only branch-wise placement statistics and recruiter eligibility were not found.
Unique placed-student counts cannot be inferred from all-campus offer counts.
Exact current hostel capacity and block inventory should be confirmed despite the current public 32-block claim.
Many clubs lack recent dated official activity records.
Official current attendance, curfew and hostel outing rules were not fully normalized.

conflicts.source_1_value: Official travel/event page describes a 370-acre campus
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Use approximately 372 acres, noting an older official 370-acre description

conflicts.source_1_value: Current hostel page: 32 blocks, 21 boys and 11 girls
conflicts.source_2_value: 2024-25 mandatory disclosure: 24 blocks, 18 boys and 6 girls
conflicts.possible_reason: Rapid hostel expansion or stale disclosure text
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Use the current 32-block page with access date and preserve the older disclosure as historical

conflicts.source_1_value: Page title/navigation presents UG Fee Structure 2026-27
conflicts.source_2_value: B.Tech subsection is explicitly labelled Academic Fee 2025-2026
conflicts.possible_reason: Only some UG sections were updated for 2026-27
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Do not label the B.Tech Group A/B tuition table as 2026-27 until updated

conflicts.source_1_value: 2026 counselling accepts campus, programme and fee-category choices
conflicts.source_2_value: Public B.Tech page publishes Group A/Group B, not Category 1–5
conflicts.possible_reason: Category-specific prices may be available only inside counselling
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Obtain the official 2026 Category 1–5 table before category-wise cost prediction

conflicts.source_1_value: NIRF UG four-year records are reported under institution ID IR-E-U-0490
conflicts.source_2_value: Current CDC tracker combines Vellore, Chennai, AP and Bhopal placement activity
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Label NIRF outcomes institution-level and avoid claiming Vellore-only results

conflicts.source_1_value: Current hostel page says over 30,000 residents annually
conflicts.possible_reason: Expansion, updated count or stale disclosure
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Use current claim with access date; confirm exact 2026 capacity administratively

conflicts.source_1_value: Official 2026-batch announcement reports 10,071 offers across four campuses
conflicts.source_2_value: NIRF reports 4,031 UG four-year students placed in 2023-24
conflicts.possible_reason: Different years and scope; offers are not unique students
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Never compare offer count directly with unique placed-student count

conflicts.source_1_value: Some mess providers receive positive hygiene/service reports
conflicts.source_2_value: Recent fresher guide reports quality and washroom/mess variation by block
conflicts.possible_reason: Provider, block, menu, time and personal preference differences
conflicts.recommended_manual_action: Present mess quality as variable and student-reported, not a single campus fact

manual_verification_required: Check whether VIT publishes final 2026 branch/category closing ranks after counselling.
Obtain the official 2026 Category 1–5 B.Tech fee table.
Confirm whether the Group A/B B.Tech tuition table has been updated for 2026-27.
Obtain a 2026-27 Vellore branch-wise sanctioned intake/seat matrix.
Request Vellore-only branch-wise placement and recruiter-eligibility data.
Confirm current hostel blocks, resident capacity, first-year allocation and outing rules.
Verify current activity and recruitment for each retained club.
Confirm current attendance and high-CGPA exemption rules.
Recheck local travel times and hostel fees immediately before import.
